expected_outcomes.lesson_objective: As a student, I want to know the basic digital skills I need to work well in computer science and what I can and cannot do in the CS rooms, so that I can be successful in the course
assessment_criteria: Be able to log on and log off of  a terminal in the computer room
Be able to lock and unlock their sessions
Will be able to state the code of conduct in the CS room and terminal discipline
Demonstrate that they can access their notebook in OneNote
Show they can add images and screenshots to their OneNote
Demonstrate they can open a link in their OneNote
Show that they can save files to their OneDrive
expected_outcomes.activity_summary: We will use teacher led demonstrations and class engagement to ensure that the basic skillsets are learned. We will get the students to update a digital literacy passport as a personal record of how they did things and a verification that the student can do what they are required to do.

dok_level.rationale: Some students may have very limited digital skills and some may have more, DOK level 2 would be the highest we would want for them.

teaching_episode.teacher_actions: Describe the layout of the room, describe the terminal, demonstrate log in and log out while discussing the processes that occur.
teaching_episode.pupil_actions: log in and out of their terminals
